title: Moderation Update: Abuse Queue Triaged
body:
Abuse queue triaged. Actions taken:

• Banned 'spam_wave_42' for phishing spam across 6 channels
• Banned 'toxic_runner' for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers
• Dismissed false-positive report against 'core_maintainer' (brigading)

3 reports resolved. 3 lower-priority reports remain open for review.
